zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Maunsell於1136年4月4日出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾蕾托 米森登時，他的父親Sir Ralph Maunsell23歲，母親Cecily De Pagnell22歲。他於1162年與Joice d'Alneto結婚。他們至少是8個兒子的父母。他去世於1205年在英國英格蘭素瑞馬爾登享年69歲。

nameMeanings.name: Maunsell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mansell
meanings: (of Norman origin): habitational name from Old French mansel ‘inhabitant of Le Mans or the surrounding area of Maine’. The place was originally named in Latin (ad) Ceromannos, from the name of the Gaulish tribe living there, the Ceromanni. The name was shortened to Celmans and then became Le Mans as a result of the mistaken identification of the first syllable with the Old French demonstrative adjective.
status name for a particular type of feudal tenant, Anglo-Norman French mansel, one who occupied a manse (from Late Latin mansa ‘dwelling’), a measure of land sufficient to support one family.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Maunsell was born on 4 April 1136, in Little Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Ralph Maunsell, was 23 and his mother, Cecily De Pagnell, was 22. He married Joice d'Alneto in 1162. They were the parents of at least 8 sons. He died in 1205, in Malden, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Maunsell est né le 4 avril 1136, à Little Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Ralph Maunsell, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Cecily De Pagnell, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Joice d'Alneto en 1162. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils. Il est décédé en 1205, à Malden, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Maunsell am 4. April 1136 in Little Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Ralph Maunsell 23 und seine Mutter Cecily De Pagnell 22. Er hat 1162 Joice d'Alneto geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne. Er starb 1205 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Malden, Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Maunsellが1136年4月4日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアリットル ミセンデンで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Maunsellは23歳，母Cecily De Pagnellは22歳であった。1162年にJoice d'Alnetoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子の親であった。彼は1205年にイギリスイギリススリーマルデンで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Maunsell(이)가 1136년 4월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 리틀 미센든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ralph Maunsell(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily De Pagnell(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1162년 Joice d'Alneto(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1205년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 맬든에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Maunsell родился 4 апреля 1136 г. в местности литл миссенден, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Ralph Maunsell было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Cecily De Pagnell, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Joice d'Alneto в 1162 г. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей. Он умер в 1205 г. в местности малден, сурри, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет.
